violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Boxed food items were found stored on the floor of the freezer. -80 pound box of raw beef tubes found stored on the floor of the walk-in cooler. -Full bag of onions stored on the floor of walk-in cooler. -Stuffing mix found stored on the floor of the dry storage area.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -Cutting board must be pulled off prep table and cleaned more frequently. There is a build up of dirty liquid under the cutting board.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. -Employee was using the wrong method (had no rinse water in left sink, detergent in middle sink, and sanitation in the right sink). I advised the correct steps for each sink.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. -A pizza cutter is being stored between the sink and cooler leaving it susceptible to contamination from the sink.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Opened box of unfolded pizza boxes stored on the floor by freezer door. -Dry storage area has multiple single-use items stored on the floor -Single-use paper plates in the kitchen area are stored vertical.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Missing tiles in men's bathroom.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Under all equipment in the kitchen area is in need of cleaning. -Walk-in cooler/beer cooler floor needs a deep cleaning. Cardboard on the floor has been previously wet. Food particles throughout.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
